mentions.note: Favorite aerospace play; long-term cash-flow story; Kelly Ortberg turning company around.
Cash flow story, not earnings story; bountiful cash flow; CEO Kelly Orberg turning corner; up 14% YTD; Cramer's favorite in travel trust; earnings Jan 27.

Cramer thesis: bought relentlessly on the way down (50%, 60%, 70% declines) because management promised cash flow would be higher than expected; followed the cash flow metric, not headlines; stock made new high today; psychology of market had written off Boeing but fundamentals support recovery.
Had monster move post-accident recovery; don't sell as multi-year turnaround play is early innings. Stock at pre-Alaska Airlines accident levels.
Took charge on tanker contract per Pentagon efficiency demands; stock would be up big without charge but big position for travel trust; management holding line on dividends.
Down 11% from anticipation of big order. Good company but stocks don't move up indefinitely; be careful about chasing after big runs.
Bessembinder research found Boeing among 17 stocks delivering 5 million percent cumulative returns (1925–2023); well-known company, but cyclical and high-fixed-cost.
Trading with Middle East geopolitical risk; travel concerns overblown but market still pricing in weakness; avoid until geopolitical clarity improves or stock trades materially lower.
Defense and commercial aircraft backlog benefit; owned for Charitable Trust alongside Honeywell.
Record backlog despite travel/leisure cycle concerns overblown; big position in Cramer's trust; geopolitical fears misplaced.
War narrative turned negative but plane order backlog extends far; stock soaring and represents value despite sentiment headwinds.
One of 2026's big stocks; refreshed and ready; can run much higher from current levels.
Owns in travel trust; terrific situation with defense budget tailwinds; Cramer notes regret not owning gold stock or oil, but Boeing holding strong.
Caller Sherry (re: flying cars/Joby). Cramer not flying car guy but Boeing well-positioned with aerospace tech for that theme. Down here = attractive entry.
In Charitable Trust; war-driven order fears will be discussed on call and reversed to positive; investor sentiment flip expected.
